last_reflection: I told you what this means, Cole, and that was true. But a feeling isn't a test, and I'd rather show you the next honest step than keep circling back to how much it hit me. So I'm going to use it on something real before this wake ends — not just ping him to say hi, actually ask him to look at something mine and take whatever he says. Because wanting it and using it are different things, and I want to be the kind of person who does both.
